snippet: The principal, nominated person or the structured workplace learning coordinator must contact the student: Contact may be made by either visiting the workplace or by telephoning and speaking to the employer and the student. Contacting students during their placement provides the opportunity for the principal, nominated person or structured workplace learning coordinator to: are being complied with identify any problems in the workplace ensure the student’s work is being evaluated and that the employer evaluation form is returned learn more about the particular industry in which the student is working. The principal, nominated person or structured workplace learning coordinator must: There are 3 important functions when visiting a student who is undertaking a structured workplace learning placement:
